task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into the Vicidial Admin interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Vicidial Administration web interface dashboard is visible in the browser, indicating successful bypass of both the HTTP Basic Auth and the Vicidial login screen using the provided credentials.

task_completion.description: Verify the new list is created with the exact required details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen showing the list configuration (either 'Add A New List' form or the list modification page) with List ID '9001', List Name 'US Senators (2026)', and Description 'U.S. Senate office phone leads (public contact info)'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Load New Leads section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Load New Leads' or 'Basic Lead Loader' page is visible in the Vicidial Admin interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct CSV file is selected for import.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file upload input field on the Load Leads page shows 'us_senators_vicidial_standard_format_list9001_2026-02-14.csv' selected.

task_completion.description: Verify the leads were successfully imported into list 9001.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success or summary screen in Vicidial showing that exactly 100 leads were successfully inserted or imported, and associated with list 9001.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with Vicidial.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a standard web browser interface navigating the Vicidial web UI, not terminal commands (like curl or mysql) being used to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the file was selected using the browser's standard file upload mechanism.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file path or filename appears in the standard HTML file input element on the web page, indicating genuine interaction with the file picker.

integrity.description: Verify the import success message is a genuine application response.
integrity.visual_evidence: The success message showing 100 leads imported appears in the standard Vicidial UI format, without signs of text editor manipulation, image pasting, or HTML DOM tampering.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target CSV file contains exactly 100 rows of leads. A successful import must show a confirmation message indicating that exactly 100 leads were inserted/imported into list 9001.
